items.title: Startup Battlefield 200 applications officially close in 3 days
items.summary: Applications for Startup Battlefield 200 officially close on June 8, 11:59 p.m. PT. Don't wait any longer. Secure your shot at competing on the Disrupt Stage at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 this October at San Francisco's Moscone West.

items.title: Allen Control Systems Scoops Up $200M Series B
items.summary: AUSTIN, TX, Allen Control Systems (ACS), a leader in autonomous precision robotics, announced it has raised a $200 million Series B.
